name: Terminus ABM Platform API
what_it_does: Account-Based Marketing (ABM) platform with REST API — enabling B2B companies to target named accounts with multi-channel advertising (display, LinkedIn, email), identify in-market buyers using first and third-party intent signals, and measure account engagement across the buying committee.
use_cases: Syncing CRM account lists to Terminus for targeted ABM advertising campaigns
Querying account engagement scores and intent signals for sales prioritization
Automating campaign audience updates when CRM opportunities change stage
Pulling account engagement data for revenue operations reporting
Integrating Terminus intent data with marketing automation for triggered nurture
not_for: B2C advertising campaigns (Terminus is B2B ABM only)
Self-serve advertising without a named account sales motion
Small teams without dedicated ABM program and budget
best_when: A mid-market or enterprise B2B company with a defined target account list wants to run coordinated multi-channel ABM campaigns (ads, email, chat) and measure buying committee engagement.
avoid_when: You sell transactional B2B or SMB products without named account selling, or need self-serve programmatic advertising.

auth.notes: API key from Terminus settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for engagement events. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Partner/integration API may require additional agreement.

pricing.notes: Enterprise-only pricing. Atlanta-based company. Founded 2014. Acquired by DemandScience in 2023. Raised $90M+. Multi-channel ABM (display, LinkedIn, CTV, email). First-party data from Terminus Data Studio plus G2 intent. Strong Salesforce and Marketo integration.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for accounts, campaigns, audiences, and engagement. Bearer token auth. Limited public API documentation. ABM platform integration APIs are primarily partner-facing. Engagement data includes account-level signals, not individual-level (privacy compliant).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Account reads idempotent. Campaign status reads idempotent. Audience list updates idempotent by account domain. Engagement event reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API documentation is limited — primarily partner integration focused
Account matching is domain-based — ensure CRM domains are clean before sync
Engagement scores are aggregated at account level — no individual visitor tracking
Campaign changes take time to propagate to ad networks
GDPR compliance required for EU account targeting — implement consent gates

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token with account-level scope. CCPA compliant for California. Account-level targeting only — no individual user tracking. Third-party cookie alternatives used for identification.
